name: small law firms processing 5–15 court filings/month tool
description: For small law firms processing 5–15 court filings/month, inefficient document conversion causes delays in filing deadlines. We automate the conversion process instead of manual document preparation and filing.
target_audience: small law firms processing 5–15 court filings/month
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of legal documents into court filings
